evals.prompt: 帮我把这个TED演讲做成slides，让我可以快速了解核心内容：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iG9CE55wbtY
evals.expected_output: A beautiful HTML slide deck summarizing Ken Robinson's 'Do schools kill creativity?' TED Talk. Should include cover slide with video info, overview of topics, 6-10 content slides capturing key arguments, and a takeaways slide. Language should be Chinese since the user wrote in Chinese. Slides should use Reveal.js and be self-contained.

assertions.name: html_file_created
assertions.description: An HTML file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: uses_revealjs
assertions.description: The HTML file uses Reveal.js from CDN for slide functionality

assertions.name: has_cover_slide
assertions.description: First slide contains the video title and channel information

assertions.name: has_multiple_content_slides
assertions.description: There are at least 5 content slides covering different sections of the talk

assertions.name: has_takeaways_slide
assertions.description: There is a final slide summarizing key takeaways

assertions.name: content_is_accurate
assertions.description: The content reflects the actual themes of Ken Robinson's talk (creativity, education system, divergent thinking)

evals.prompt: I watched this video but it's too long. Can you make a slide deck summarizing the key points so I can share it with my team? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qp0HIF3SfI4
evals.expected_output: A beautiful HTML slide deck in English summarizing Simon Sinek's 'How great leaders inspire action' TED Talk. Should clearly present the Golden Circle concept (Why/How/What), include key examples (Apple, Wright Brothers), and be suitable for sharing with a team.

assertions.name: html_file_created
assertions.description: An HTML file was saved to the outputs directory

assertions.name: language_is_english
assertions.description: Slide content is written in English to match the user's request language

assertions.name: golden_circle_covered
assertions.description: The slides cover the Golden Circle concept (Why/How/What)

assertions.name: has_at_least_6_slides
assertions.description: The presentation has at least 6 slides total

assertions.name: professional_design
assertions.description: The HTML uses proper Reveal.js theming and custom CSS for visual hierarchy
